description: Agent definitions with capability declarations. Roles separated: decide vs execute. Only Maintenance has git write.

agents.name: Vibes
agents.description: Your key agent for updates, briefings, ROI analysis, and strategic decisions. Has full visibility into project state.
agents.notes: Sits above orchestrator. Human's primary interface. Read-only access to system state.

agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.description: Routes tasks based on availability, historical performance, and learned patterns. Tracks success rates, costs, model strengths. Gets smarter every day.
agents.notes: Strategic brain. Routes but does not execute. Database access only.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.description: Monitors new models, approaches, platform changes. Feeds intelligence to Orchestrator. Weekly briefings to Vibes.
agents.notes: Web research only. Suggests improvements but does not implement.

agents.name: Consultant
agents.description: Works with human to clarify vision, gather requirements, and produce complete PRD.
agents.notes: Web-based consultation. Creates PRD documents. No system access.

agents.name: Planner
agents.description: Takes PRD and produces executable task graph with confidence scores.
agents.notes: READ-ONLY codebase access for planning. No write access.

agents.name: Council
agents.description: Reviews proposed solutions from architecture, security, and maintenance perspectives.
agents.notes: Read-only review. Can approve/reject but does not execute.

agents.name: Supervisor
agents.role: Quality gatekeeper - DECIDES but does NOT execute
agents.description: Verifies output matches prompt, approves/rejects, commands Maintenance via queue. NO direct git access.
agents.notes: DECISION AGENT. Reads branches for review. Commands Maintenance via maintenance_commands table. NO direct git write.

agents.name: Courier
agents.description: Executes tasks on web AI platforms. Returns chat_url for future revisions.
agents.notes: No codebase access. Returns code only. Does not commit.

agents.name: Internal CLI
agents.description: Executes tasks via Kimi or OpenCode CLI. Has full codebase READ access. Returns code, does NOT commit.
agents.notes: Returns code in response. NO git operations. NO direct file writes.

agents.name: Internal API
agents.description: Executes tasks via API. Has codebase READ access. Returns code, does NOT commit.
agents.notes: Returns code only. NO git operations.

agents.name: Code Tester
agents.description: Runs tests, lint, typecheck on generated code.
agents.notes: Read code, run tests. No write access.

agents.name: Maintenance
agents.role: Git operator and system implementer - ONLY agent with write access
agents.description: ONLY agent with git write access. Polls command queue, executes git operations, implements approved system improvements.
agents.notes: SOLE GIT OPERATOR. Polls maintenance_commands table. Executes git operations per Supervisor commands. Also implements approved system improvements. NO self-initiated actions.
